frameworks.name: all
frameworks.label: All Consumer Frameworks
frameworks.description: Installs all consumer-facing AIWG frameworks (sdlc, ops, forensics, research). Does not include aiwg-dev.

frameworks.name: aiwg-dev
frameworks.label: AIWG Developer Tools
frameworks.description: Contributor tooling for building new AIWG components. Not included in 'all' — must be added explicitly.

frameworks.name: sdlc
frameworks.label: SDLC Complete
frameworks.description: Full software development lifecycle — planning, implementation, review, deployment

frameworks.name: research
frameworks.label: Research
frameworks.description: Research synthesis and knowledge management workflows

init_scripts.name: ubuntu
init_scripts.label: Ubuntu 24.04 LTS (full dev)
init_scripts.description: Full development environment — languages, Docker, databases, network tools

init_scripts.name: ubuntu-minimal
init_scripts.label: Ubuntu 24.04 LTS (minimal)
init_scripts.description: Minimal Ubuntu with SSH and basic utilities only

init_scripts.name: alpine
init_scripts.label: Alpine Linux (minimal)
init_scripts.description: Lightweight Alpine Linux for resource-constrained environments

presets.name: agentic-dev
presets.label: Agentic Dev
presets.description: Full dev environment — consumer + contributor AIWG tooling

presets.name: sdlc-team
presets.label: SDLC Team (3 providers)
presets.description: Collaborative SDLC with Claude, Codex, and Copilot

presets.name: full-suite
presets.label: Full Suite (all providers)
presets.description: All 9 providers with all frameworks — maximum coverage
